blurb: Apple platforms support enterprise-grade VPN through IKEv2/IPsec and TLS-based protocols via the Network Extension framework, with legacy L2TP/IPsec compatibility for older infrastructure. Per-app VPN routes only specific app traffic through the corporate tunnel, reducing unnecessary network overhead while allowing personal apps to access the internet directly. Always On VPN, configured via MDM, maintains a permanent tunnel to corporate infrastructure reconnecting transparently after network changes without user interaction. VPN configurations and credentials are stored in the device Keychain and delivered in CMS-encrypted MDM payloads, preventing credential exposure during provisioning.
